subjects_i_dislike: Spanish — I just don't get it
academics.rigor_self_rating: Standard — regular classes mostly, no APs yet but might take one next year

academics.approach_to_school: I show up, I do the work, I get B's mostly. School is fine. It's not really my thing but it's not bad.

sports.play_in_college: No, probably not — I like it but I'm not good enough

visual_arts.medium: Painting (acrylic), some digital art on my iPad
visual_arts.portfolio_pieces: I have a sketchbook full of stuff. Nothing official.
visual_arts.pursue_in_college: Maybe? I don't know if I'm good enough.

I helped my older sister with her wedding invitations — I designed them and they came out really good
clubs_leadership: Art Club — member, no leadership role
Environmental Club — I went to a few meetings
work: I babysit for my neighbors sometimes
Worked at a summer day camp last summer as a counselor
activities.community_service: Some hours through National Honor Society stuff. Maybe 20 hours total.

identity.first_gen_college: No — both my parents have college degrees
identity.disability: ADHD — I have a 504 plan. Mostly extra time on tests.
identity.other_background: Honestly nothing that stands out. I'm pretty average.

financial_reality.family_situation: We can pay full price for state schools but need help for private. Don't really know much about the FAFSA stuff yet.
financial_reality.max_out_of_pocket_per_year: I don't actually know what my parents can pay — we haven't had that conversation

what_i_want.dream_vibe: Somewhere where I'd actually have friends and not be miserable. Not too big.
what_i_want.city_vs_campus: Campus-feels-like-its-own-world, I think? But I don't really know.
what_i_want.distance_from_home: Same state or road trip distance — I want to be able to come home
what_i_want.size_preference: Medium (2K-10K) — small feels like high school again, big feels overwhelming
what_i_want.diversity: Somewhat? I don't really know what I want
what_i_want.instant_no: Somewhere where everyone is rich and I'd feel out of place
what_i_want.instant_yes: Somewhere people seem chill and there's stuff to do

pathway: I genuinely have no idea — help me figure it out

career_direction.today_pick: I really don't know. Maybe something with art? Or teaching? I like working with younger kids.
interesting_careers: Graphic designer (I think this is what I'd like but I don't really know what they do)
Something working with animals — vet tech?
career_direction.miserable_in_job: Sitting at a desk doing the same thing every day. Or working with mean people.
majors_considering: I don't know — maybe education? Art? Liberal arts and figure it out?

real_talk.schools_should_know: I'm not someone with a clear story yet. I'm 16 and I'm trying to figure stuff out. I don't want to feel pressured to have it all together when I obviously don't.
real_talk.worry: Picking the wrong thing and wasting money. Or my parents being disappointed in me. Or going somewhere and having no friends.
real_talk.success_in_4_years: Honestly, finishing whatever I started and not hating my life. Maybe figuring out what I want to do.
real_talk.anything_else: I'm a sophomore — I have time. Help me think about what to look for in the next year, not just pick schools right now. Maybe community college? I'm open.
